meta_title: For Founders: Claude Code skills setup to Solve can't finish projects (Beginner Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to Claude Code skills setup and overcome can't finish projects. A Beginner-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: Claude Code Skills Setup to Launch Faster
content.seo_description: Stop abandoning projects. Learn how to leverage Claude Code and Antigravity to build, iterate, and monetize your SaaS MVP with professional-grade AI workflows.
content.answer_block: The 'can't finish' syndrome stems from technical friction, not lack of vision. By integrating Claude Code with Antigravity, you transform your CLI into a high-leverage development engine. This stack automates boilerplate, enforces architectural standards, and maintains momentum, allowing you to ship your MVP to paying users in record time.
content.intro:
You have the vision, the market research, and the drive. Yet, your GitHub repositories are graveyards of 80% completed projects. The gap between a 'great idea' and a 'shipped product' is often filled with the soul-crushing friction of environment configuration, debugging dependency hell, and lost context. It is the silent killer of founder ambition.

But the era of manual coding drag is over. By mastering Claude Code in tandem with Antigravity, you stop being a bottleneck and start acting as a Lead Architect. We are moving from 'writing code' to 'orchestrating features,' turning your terminal into a force multiplier that bridges the gap between inception and revenue.

steps.title: Initialize Environment with Precision
steps.description: Establish a clean, scalable project structure. Never start from scratch; start from a validated architecture that supports rapid scaling.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a production-ready SaaS directory structure using Next.js, Tailwind, and Supabase. Include clear separation between UI, API routes, and database models.

steps.title: Configure Claude Code Context
steps.description: Claude Code needs to understand your business logic. Feed it the core requirements to ensure every generated line aligns with your revenue goals.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a .claudeprompt file that defines our coding standards: focus on type-safety, modularity, and rapid feature iteration for a B2B SaaS context.

steps.title: Automate Feature Scaffolding
steps.description: Stop writing boilerplate. Use the AI to generate the heavy lifting for your CRUD operations so you can focus on unique value propositions.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Scaffold a secure authentication and user dashboard module that follows our established design pattern.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Implement user profile CRUD with Supabase integration'

steps.title: Implement Intelligent Error Handling
steps.description: Anticipate failure before it happens. Use Claude Code to audit your code for edge cases that usually lead to technical debt.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Audit the current codebase for potential race conditions and missing error boundaries in the payment processing flow.

steps.title: Deploy and Validate
steps.description: Finalize your build for production. Ensure the product is ready to capture its first dollar by verifying the critical user path.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a deployment checklist and a sanity check script for our primary conversion funnel.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Execute end-to-end test suite and prepare build artifacts'

pro_tips: Always maintain a 'context.md' file in your root; Claude Code reads this to stay aligned with your specific business logic.
Use Claude Code's --staged flag to review changes before they hit your main branch, preventing the 'AI hallucination' trap.
Treat your Antigravity prompts as 'System Instructions'—the more specific the constraints on tech stack, the less time you spend refactoring.
If the AI struggles, break the task into smaller sub-tasks; Claude Code performs significantly better when restricted to a single file change at a time.
Use your terminal history as a log of your development velocity; if you aren't shipping a feature every 4 hours, your prompt granularity is too low.
content.next_steps: Once your MVP is deployed, begin the feedback loop: monitor your logs for user friction points, then feed those specific error reports back into Claude Code to implement iterative fixes.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting technical friction delay your revenue. By automating your build process, you reclaim the time needed to focus on growth and customer acquisition. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
